But there are many things that you need to consider before sending text messages to **your customers**. This article will teach you everything you need to know about **SMS advertising in UAE**. AS SEEN ON ![Image 1](blob:http://localhost/0d4670b89b7b606b2b4491ad472ebc50)![Image 2](blob:http://localhost/0d4670b89b7b606b2b4491ad472ebc50) AND OVER 450 NEWS SITES ## What is SMS Marketing a.k.a. SMS Advertising? **Short Message Service (SMS)** is an inexpensive form of communication that has become increasingly popular among consumers. It is also one of the most powerful ways to reach people because it reaches everyone who owns a mobile phone. In fact, according to [YouGov](https://yougov.co.uk/topics/technology/explore/topic/Mobile_phones), nearly 90% of U.A.E adults own a cell phone and [the average person checks their phones 344 times a day!](https://neilpatel.com/blog/sms-marketing/) ## Understand the Benefits of Using SMS Marketing There are several benefits to using text messaging as part of your _**marketing**_ strategy. **First**, it allows you to communicate with your customers at any time, day or night. [And in fact the average open rate for SMS messages is 98%.](https://optinmonster.com/sms-marketing/) **Second**, it provides a low-cost option compared to traditional methods of advertising. **Third**, it gives you the ability to send personalized messages to each customer. **Fourth**, it helps you build relationships with your customers by allowing you to interact with them directly. **Finally**, it allows you to track the effectiveness of your campaigns. ## Is SMS advertising effective to small businesses or medium to large businesses only? Think of it that way, SMS marketing can reach millions of people in minutes. It\u2019s the best way for marketers to get in touch with potential customers and increase their sales which could lead them to expand their business. In other words, regardless of the size of the business, utilizing mobile marketing in the right ways will be of added value for you. Some examples of the business categories which are already applying SMS advertising: *   Real Estate *   **Restaurants** *   Retail Shops\n...\nMarkdown Content: ## We believe in affordable **SMS Advertising** solution for all businesses ## SMS Marketing Agency In UAE Text messaging has become an increasingly popular way for businesses to reach customers. But there are many things that you need to consider before sending text messages to **your customers**. This article will teach you everything you need to know about **SMS advertising in UAE**. AS SEEN ON ![Image 1](blob:http://localhost/0d4670b89b7b606b2b4491a", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Bedding Industry Statistics: Market Data Report 2026", "url": "https://gitnux.org/bedding-industry-statistics/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Duvet and comfortermarketreached $12.3billion in 2023, with North America holding 30%marketshare. ...marketsize was $1.5 billion in 2023, ...", "relevance_score": 0.5}, {"title": "15 FASCINATING Facts About Central Park That May Surprise You", "url": "https://newyorkdearest.com/interesting-facts-about-central-park-nyc/", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] The Mall | Cool Facts About Central Park ### There\u2019s only one straight line in the entire park Want to know one of my favorite facts about Central Park? There\u2019s only one straight line in the entire park. The park is defined by meandering paths that curve from one point to the next and they\u2019re intentionally built that way. The vision for the park was that it would represent the natural flow of nature. Some argue that the park was intentional designed without straight lines to deter horse carriage races, but that hasn\u2019t been confirmed. What has been confirmed is that the only straight in the park can be found at The Mall. **The Mall was referred to as the \u201copen air hall of reception\u201d by the park\u2019s architects and served as a place for the wealthy to parade and show off in front of the \u201cless fortunate.\u201d** The width of the promenade accommodated horse-drawn carriages that would drop off the wealthy at the start of the Mall so that they could mingle with those of lesser status while casually strolling through. When they reached Bethesda Terrace they would simple jump aboard their awaiting carriages and head home. ### The Mall is home to the largest plantation of American elm in the world Speaking of The Mall, the stunning American Elms that line the promenade are considered to be the largest surviving plantations of the American elm in the world. Although common at the time they were planted, they American elm has been dying off across the country. However, the trees located at the Mall are well taken care of and seem very healthy. ### Surprising fact about Central Park. It\u2019s not the _largest_ park in New York City Remember how I mentioned that Central Park was larger than the country of Monaco? Well, allow me to share a surprising Central Park fact with you, it\u2019s not even the biggest park in New York City! The title for the largest park in NYC goes to Pelham Bay Park in the Bronx. Spanning an impressive 2,765 acres, Pelham Bay Park dwarfs Central Park. Heck, Central Park isn\u2019t even the second, third or fourth largest park in the city (it\u2019s the 5th largest). ![Image 8: Cool Central Park Facts](https://newyorkdearest.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Central-Park-Fall-01462.jpg) Central Park in the Fall | Interesting Central Park Facts ### Yet, it\u2019s the most visited park in the country Regardless of the fact that it\u2019s not even the biggest park in the city, Central Park is the most visited park in the country. How\u2019s that for surprising facts about Central Park? The park gets an average of 42 million visitors per year, making it one of the most visited places in the world. The best part? Most are return visitors and an estimated 70% of park visitors are locals. As a local I can confirm that Central Park doesn\u2019t lose it\u2019s magic or charm, even on the hundredth visit. ![Image 9: Interesting Central Park facts](https://newyorkdearest.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/NYC-SPRING-03415-1.jpg) Central Park is completely man-made | Unusual Facts About Central Park ### ", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Exploring the Golgappa Franchise Market in India and How to", "url": "https://epanipuricart.com/blog/exploring-the-golgappa-franchise-market-in-india-and-how-to-start-your-on-your-own", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content]     *   Menu innovation\u2014fusion recipes, regional variants     *   Digital ordering and delivery partnerships     *   Preferred locations: malls and busy food courts Want higher profit margins? Target cities with trendy food scenes and tech-savvy customers. Investments for these outlets often range from \u20b95 lakh to \u20b915 lakh, but returns can be strong if you keep up with changing tastes. 3.   ### The Role of Hygiene and Automation in Modern Franchises Hygiene isn\u2019t just a buzzword\u2014it's a must. Franchises like [Chennai Golgappa](https://chennaigolgappa.com/) follow FSSAI Section 4.2.1 for food safety, using automated machines to ensure clean service. After the pandemic, 73% of urban customers say hygiene influences where they eat (SiliconIndia, 2023).     *   Automated pani puri machines for consistency     *   Regular staff training and FSSAI certification     *   Investment: \u20b91 lakh\u2013\u20b93 lakh extra for equipment and training You'll build trust and win repeat customers by prioritizing health and safety. If you're aiming for premium urban markets, this approach is essential. 4.   ### Regional Flavor Variations and Their Market Impact Every state brings its own twist to golgappa. In Maharashtra, spicy tamarind water is a hit, while Bengal prefers mint chutney. Successful franchises adapt menus for local tastes, which can double repeat visits according to franchisees in Kolkata and Mumbai.     *   Customizing pani and fillings per region     *   Special festival editions boost sales     *   Minor R&D costs\u2014usually under \u20b950,000 Want to expand into new states? Testing flavors with local customers before launch can be the difference between average and standout sales. 5.   ### What Growing Urban Demand Means for Franchise Expansion Urban centers like Mumbai, Delhi, Bengaluru, and Chennai are prime spots for golgappa franchises. High footfall in malls and metro stations drives monthly profits up to \u20b980,000, with profit margins averaging 15%\u201330% (Franchise India, 2023). | **City** | **Investment Required** | **Profit Margin** | | --- | --- | --- | | Mumbai | \u20b95\u2013\u20b910 lakh | 20%\u201330% | | Delhi | \u20b94\u2013\u20b99 lakh | 18%\u201328% | | Bengaluru | \u20b95\u2013\u20b911 lakh | 15%\u201325% | | Chennai | \u20b94\u2013\u20b98 lakh | 15%\u201322% | If you're serious about scaling, focus on these cities and use digital marketing to reach more customers.
